q: Do you keep plants at home?
examiner_note: Nói về trang trí và lợi ích. Sử dụng 'low-maintenance', 'succulents', 'purify the air', 'aesthetic touch'.

band7.text: Yes, I have a few low-maintenance indoor plants like succulents and a snake plant in my living room. They not only add a touch of greenery but also help to purify the air and create a more relaxing atmosphere in my home.
band7.note: Sử dụng ví dụ cụ thể (succulents) và giải thích lợi ích (purify, relaxing).

band8.text: I’m a big fan of indoor greenery. I have quite a collection of tropical plants scattered throughout my apartment. I find that they significantly enhance the aesthetic of my living space and provide a sense of serenity that is hard to find in a busy city.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng hay (greenery, scattered, enhance, aesthetic, serenity).

band9.text: Absolutely, my home is essentially a small urban jungle. I find that surrounding myself with living plants is vital for my mental well-being. Beyond their air-purifying qualities, they provide a constant connection to the natural world and serve as a living testament to the beauty and resilience of life.
band9.note: Sử dụng ẩn dụ và từ vựng cao (urban jungle, vital, air-purifying, testament).

v.example: I love the serenity of the early morning.
His clothes were scattered all over the floor.
Plants help to purify the air.

advanced_vocab.example: The success is a testament to her hard work.

similar_questions: Do you prefer real plants or artificial ones?
Is it easy to take care of plants at home?
